Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. Witness incredible rallies, aggressive plays, and strategic dinks as these top players battle it out for a spot in Championship Saturday. Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Video.summary: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Video.title: S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators

Image.alt: S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators
S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators
S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators

Video.summary: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Video.summary: Experience the intensity of collegiate pickleball as the University of Arkansas "Hogs" face off against UT Dallas in a high-stakes pool play matchup at the NCPA 2025 Dallas Regional. This "best-of-seven" format showcases the full spectrum of the sport, including gender doubles, singles, and mixed doubles, with teams competing for a prize pool and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis.The match features elite collegiate talent, including Arkansas’ Alison Lee and Yasmine Humbert, who bring high-energy play and powerful forehands to the court. They are met with fierce competition from UT Dallas standouts Chloe Tu, Alex Hayek, and Austin Lee. Watch as the teams battle through momentum shifts and high-speed hand battles at the kitchen line, ultimately leading to a high-pressure sudden death tiebreaker.
Video.title: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Image.alt: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Video.summary: Hunter Johnson and Parris Todd take on Megan Fudge and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Straight from The Orchard at Jigsaw Health, Tuesday Night Pickleball brings you a high-octane women’s doubles matchup featuring four elite pros. Anna Bright and Jessie Irvine team up with firepower and finesse to take on the seasoned duo of Lucy Kovalova and Catherine Parenteau.From smart stacking and sharp cross-court dinks to quick hands battles and momentum swings, this match is packed with elite-level tactics and crowd-thrilling rallies. It’s classic TNP: fun, fiery, and full of flair.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Video.summary: In Game 6 of the AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court, the Sarasota Manatees take on the Saint Pete Icebergs. The Manatees jump to a commanding lead, while the commentators highlight new Icebergs player Mandy Gabriel.
